zh.Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭艾斯爾登東納爾德
zh.Shenton, Leicestershire, England: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾申頓

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alesta nic Morggán of Mar於1145年之前出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾卡里克時，她的父親Morgund Macgylocher 2nd Earl30歲，母親Agnes de Braose14歲。她於1165年之前與Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1200年在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland: 苏格兰艾斯爾登東納爾德
zh-hans.Shenton, Leicestershire, England: 英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾申頓
zh-hans.Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alesta nic Morggán of Mar于1145年之前出生在苏格兰艾斯爾卡里克时，她的父亲Morgund Macgylocher 2nd Earl30岁，母亲Agnes de Braose14岁。她于1165年之前与Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1200年在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: nic
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

nameMeanings.name: Morggán
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): from the medieval Welsh personal name Morgan, Morgant (Old Welsh Morcant, of uncertain etymology).
Irish: importation of the Welsh surname (see 1 above), to which has been assimilated more than one Gaelic surname, notably Ó Muireagáin (see Merrigan ).
Scottish: probably from a Gaelic personal name cognate with Welsh Morcant.

variants.name: Merrigan
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireagáin ‘descendant of Muireagán’ a personal name derived from muir ‘sea’. Compare Morgan , with which this name has been confused.

variants.name: Morgans
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): variant of Morgan , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Alesta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Alicia
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Alesta nic Morggán of Mar was born before 1145, in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Morgund Macgylocher 2nd Earl, was 30 and her mother, Agnes de Braose, was 14. She married Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland before 1165, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1200, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alesta nic Morggán of Mar est née avant 1145, à Carrick, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Morgund Macgylocher 2nd Earl, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Braose, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland avant 1165, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1200, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alesta nic Morggán of Mar vor 1145 in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Morgund Macgylocher 2nd Earl 30 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Braose 14. Sie hat vor 1165 in Scotland Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1200 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alesta nic Morggán of Mar è nata il prima del 1145 nel Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Morgund Macgylocher 2nd Earl, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Braose, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland prima del 1165, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1200, nel sua cittadina.

ja.Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland: スコットランドエイルシュアイアダンドナルド
ja.Dundonald Castle, Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotla: スコットランドエイルシュアイアクイル
ja.Shenton, Leicestershire, England: イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアシェントン
ja.Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland: スコットランドエイルシュアイアカーリック
ja.Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland: スコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリー
ja.lifeSummary: Alesta nic Morggán of Marが1145年以前にスコットランドエイルシュアイアカーリックで生まれた時，父Morgund Macgylocher 2nd Earlは30歳，母Agnes de Braoseは14歳であった。1165年以前にスコットランドでAlan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1200年に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alesta nic Morggán of Mar(이)가 1145년 이전 스컷랜드 에이르실르 카릭에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Morgund Macgylocher 2nd Earl(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Braose(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1165년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1200년 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.Shenton, Leicestershire, England: Shenton, Ratae Coritanorum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alesta nic Morggán of Mar nasceu antes 1145, em Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Morgund Macgylocher 2nd Earl, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Braose, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland antes 1165, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1200, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alesta nic Morggán of Mar родилась перед 1145 г. в местности каррикк, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Morgund Macgylocher 2nd Earl было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Braose, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland перед 1165 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1200 г. в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alesta nic Morggán of Mar nació antes de 1145, en Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Morgund Macgylocher 2nd Earl, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Agnes de Braose, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland antes de 1165, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1200, en su pueblo.
